infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Consite uses your location only when you tap Clock In, to verify you are at the project site. Your location is not tracked at any other time.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Consite uses the camera to take photos for site documentation and form attachments.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Consite accesses your photo library to attach images to forms and project records.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Consite to use your location when you clock in.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Consite to attach photos to forms.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Consite to use the camera for site photos.
